ai_assistance: AI assisted with runner implementation and API manifest probe; no PM10 coverage pass/fail outcome was selected.
allowed_claim_sentence: EEA AQ manual track blocked on incomplete URL manifest
baseline_control_summary: Fixed source-readiness controls: EEA download API, Primary validated data (E1a), PM10 pollutant URI, BE/DE/NL country set, daily aggregation, 2018-2024 period, complete URL manifest before coverage scoring.
block_reason: The fixed EEA PM10 E1a daily source reported downloadable files for BE and NL, but the reproducible URL-list endpoint returned zero URLs for those countries. The PM10 coverage gate cannot be run fairly from a complete public manifest.
claim_boundary: This blocked manual-track record states only that EEA AQ D-001 could not fairly run the fixed PM10 daily coverage gate from a complete public URL manifest. It does not claim air-quality coverage, forecasting performance, health impact, legal reuse clearance or source failure outside this protocol.
known_limitations: No PM10 coverage pass or fail result is claimed.
No air-quality forecasting claim is made.
No legal conclusion about EEA data reuse is made.
No raw EEA payload files or URL manifests are committed.
A future operator may complete the raw-payload path outside the repository and publish a new pass, insufficient-coverage or blocked card.
manual_review: Source boundary, fixed filters, no-raw-payload policy and blocked manual-track claim boundary reviewed in this repository update.
raw_payload_manifest: No raw payloads collected; API manifest probe only. Combined summary reported 857 files, but URL-list output contained 244 DE URLs and zero BE/NL URLs.
source_rights_note: The probe used the public EEA download API metadata only; this card records source-boundary evidence and makes no legal conclusion.
